items.title: Artist Claire Valdez Is Ready for Congress
items.summary: The New York State assembly member talks politics and painting in a Hyperallergic interview.

items.title: Claire Valdez Wants to Be Your Artist in Congress
items.summary: The New York State assemblywoman, who is running for a seat in the House of Representatives, spoke with Hyperallergic about her life as a painter, political origin story, and big plans for Washington.

items.title: House Proposes Slashing Major Arts Education Grant
items.summary: The program has awarded millions in grants for organizations serving families living below local poverty lines.

items.title: Kaleidoscopic Subway Mosaics Celebrate Flatbush’s Theater History
items.summary: At the Church Avenue station, Christopher Myers’s glass-tiled panels explore the rich legacy of vaudeville and Afro-Caribbean carnival culture.
